message.content:
Done. I've created a sawtooth bass instrument on channel 0 and written a short bassline for it. The instrument uses a sawtooth oscillator with an ADSR envelope for proper note gating. The bassline is a simple 8-step pattern in C minor.

The changes have been compiled and are ready to play. Just press the play button in the app to hear it.
